data.title: EQB announces voting results of annual general meeting of shareholders
data.description: Today, EQB Inc. (TSX: EQB) revealed the appointment of all 10 nominees listed in the management information circular from February 25, 2026, as directors of EQB at the annual general meeting. The meeting, held earlier today, solidified the leadership team for the company.

data.title: In HelloNation, Twin Peaks Marketing Director Stephanie Gray Examines the Rise of Scratch Cooking at Sports Bars
data.description: A recent article discusses the changing landscape of game-day dining in Chattanooga, Tennessee as of April 8, 2026. The focus is on the shift towards fresh preparation and in-house cooking at sports bars to meet evolving guest expectations. Many establishments are revamping their kitchens to adapt to this trend, as highlighted in a recent article by HelloNation.

data.title: Function Acquires Getlabs, Bringing Healthcare Directly to You
data.description: Function, a company based in Austin, Texas, has recently announced its acquisition of Getlabs, a prominent mobile healthcare platform. This acquisition signifies Function's progression in enhancing access to vital health data for individuals wherever they may be – be it at home, the workplace, or any other location. This move showcases Function's commitment to provide essential health services to a larger audience. The acquisition was finalized on April 8, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin ATM operator reveals $3.6M in BTC stolen in recent corporate hack, after attackers obtained settlement account credentials.
data.description: The operator of a Bitcoin ATM recently reported a security breach that occurred approximately two weeks ago. During the incident, hackers were able to obtain control of the operator's settlement account credentials, allowing them to steal an undisclosed amount of Bitcoin (BTC).

data.title: Grupo Cibest S.A. ANNOUNCES FILING OF THE 2025 ANNUAL REPORT ON FORM 20-F
data.description: Colombia's Medellín-based company, Grupo Cibest S.A., recently disclosed that it submitted its annual report on Form 20-F. This announcement was made on April 8, 2026. Grupo Cibest S.A. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CIB. For further details on this news, the complete report can be accessed via Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Ceasefire Spurs Bullish Turn, What's Your Move? Google, Nvidia Parent Among 7 New Buys
data.description: A positive shift was seen in the stock market following the announcement of a ceasefire in Iran. Major companies like Google, Broadcom, and Nvidia subsidiary Vertiv showed signs indicating a good time to buy. The Dow Jones Futures also reflected optimism due to the Iran ceasefire, prompting investors to consider their next moves. Notably, Google and Nvidia's parent company were among the seven new stocks identified as potential buys in the current market conditions.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rallies 1,300 Points Amid Iran Ceasefire; This Chip Stock Breaks Out (Live Coverage)
data.description: Following news of a ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran, the Dow Jones index witnessed a significant surge of 1,300 points. This development coincided with a sharp decline in oil prices. The stock market today experienced a surge, with particular focus on a chip stock making notable gains during live coverage.

data.title: HelloNation Breaks Down Why Car A/C Systems Can Blow Hot Air, Featuring Auto Repair Expert Alex Kacsh
data.description: In Thornton, Colorado, a recent article highlighted prevalent issues with car A/C systems and advised drivers on steps to take to improve cooling efficiency. The article, published by HelloNation, discusses the common problem of car A/C blowing hot air. Drivers in Thornton are encouraged to inspect their A/C systems for possible issues. By addressing these problems promptly, drivers can restore their car's cooling performance.

data.title: Canva Acquires Simtheory and Ortto, Boosting AI and Marketing Power
data.description: In a recent development in Sydney, Canva has announced the acquisition of Simtheory and Ortto. This strategic move aims to propel Canva's transformation into an AI-first platform, enhancing its capabilities in supporting the entire work and marketing cycle. This acquisition is expected to significantly boost Canva's technological advancements while expanding its market reach.

data.title: Swisslog Healthcare Opens Doors to Boulder Chamber Manufacturing Group
data.description: Swisslog Healthcare, a key provider in pharmacy and transport automation solutions, recently held the Boulder Area Manufacturing Sector Partnership's initial meeting of 2026 at its Broomfield location. The event facilitated interaction between local manufacturing experts and public partners to assess resources and address key priorities in the Boulder area manufacturing sector. This gathering served as a platform for discussions and networking, showcasing Swisslog Healthcare's commitment to fostering collaboration within the industry.

data.title: Antelope Valley Commerce Center Secures Landmark Entitlement of 9.4 Million Square Feet, Positioning Palmdale as Southern California's Next Major Industrial Hub
data.description: In Palmdale, California, on April 8, 2026, the Antelope Valley Commerce Center (AVCC) announced securing entitlement approval for one of the most extensive industrial entitlements in Los Angeles County. The approval applies to AVCC East, permitting more than 8 million square feet.

data.title: SSR Mining to Announce First Quarter 2026 Consolidated Financial Results May 5, 2026
data.description: A press release from SSR Mining Inc. (Nasdaq/TSX: SSRM) stated that the company will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026, after the markets close. Following this, a conference call to review the results will take place at 5:00 pm EDT on the same day. This call is open to investors, media, and the public. Key dates include the news release of the financial results on May 5, 2026, and the conference call/webcast.

data.title: Wheaton Precious Metals to Release 2026 First Quarter Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Wheaton Precious Metals Corp is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7 following the market closure. Subsequently, on May 8 at 8:00 am PT or 11:00 am ET, a conference call will take place to delve into these results. This event marks an important occasion for stakeholders and investors alike to gain insights into the company's progress.

data.title: DPM Metals Announces Martin Horgan as Nominee to the Board of Directors and 2026 Annual Meeting Date
data.description: In a recent press release, it was revealed that DPM Metals Inc. (TSX: DPM, ASX: DPM) ( ARBN: 689370894) has put forth Martin Horgan as a nominee for the Board of Directors. The Company's 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders is scheduled for Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 11 AM EDT. Mr. Horgan, joining a group of seven incumbent directors, will be up for election at this crucial event.
